case_title: GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL AUTO LEASE,INC., vs. PACIFIC BELL et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-09-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

#5 BENSON/HOLMES: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. ATTYS M SHECKLER FOR PLTF & P GLYNN FOR DEFT. ASSOCIATIONAL DISCLOSURE MADE BY JUDGE BENSON. NO OTHER JUDGES AVAILABLE.

1:34PM DEPT 8, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH SIDES WAIVE OPENING STATEMENTS. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN IN BOTH PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENSE CASES. CAUSE SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL $3,709.50 PRINCIPAL, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,821.50, PLUS ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO A COST BILL.
